_note: Ephemeral demo -> PVC -> mount -> write -> restart -> persist, then the Block PVC challenge. PVCs omit storageClassName so the cluster default class binds. CRC-specific realities: (1) the default class is WaitForFirstConsumer, so the PVC binds only after the consumer Pod is deployed — deploy first, then check Bound; (2) the marker is written under /opt/app-root/src/data (the image's writable home) because hello-dcs runs non-root and cannot write a root-owned mount at /data — that mount-path fix is baked into the workshop manifest. KNOWN COVERAGE GAP: CRC's portless session SCC is RunAsAny, so the mounted hostpath volume stays root-owned and no fsGroup is auto-assigned; we patch fsGroup=1001 ONLY so the write can succeed on CRC. CRC therefore does NOT validate real-DCS File-storage write permissions (restricted-v2 + File/NFS CSI behave differently) — validate that path manually on DCS. See test/workshops/README (storage note).

steps.run: oc create deployment hello-dcs --image="$DCS_REGISTRY/samples/hello-dcs:1.0" && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc exec deploy/hello-dcs -- sh -c 'echo written-inside-the-container > /opt/app-root/src/note && cat /opt/app-root/src/note'
oc delete pod -l app=hello-dcs && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s

envsubst < hello-dcs-with-volume.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=merge -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"securityContext":{"fsGroup":1001}}}}}' && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc rollout restart deploy/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
